# Rouh | روح

> Syrian luxury perfume store offering authentic oriental and western fragrances with cash-on-delivery shipping across Syria.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured perfumes, brand story, and personality quiz CTA.
- [Shop](/shop): Full catalog of luxury perfumes filterable by category and fragrance family.
- [Perfume Quiz](/quiz): 5-question personality quiz that recommends a perfume and rewards a 10% discount code.
- [About](/about): The Rouh brand story, vision, and mission rooted in Damascus heritage.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, email, and address for customer support.
